data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for upcoming inspection reminders.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'upcoming inspection reminders'. However, the provided evidence does not include any details or endpoints that confirm the existence or functionality of such reminders. The only related information pertains to a specific scenario involving a forklift inspection, which does not address the broader requirement for reminders across all equipment types.
gaps: No evidence of upcoming inspection reminders being implemented or verified.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence for upcoming inspection reminders
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete evidence or API endpoints that verify the implementation of upcoming inspection reminders.
